src/main/java/net/mariasoft/administrati.general_idea: Enable configuration properties binding for MariasoftProperies class.
Reformat indentation from tabs to spaces.
Add the full implementation of the Structures JPA entity class, including fields, annotations, and getters/setters.

src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.general_idea: Add logging configuration for root, Hibernate SQL, and application packages.
src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.after:
logging:
  level:
    ROOT: INFO
    org.hibernate.SQL: DEBUG
    net.mariasoft.administrations: DEBUG

src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.general_idea: Remove Spring application name and profile group definitions.
src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.before:
spring:
  application:
    name: mariasoft_administrations
  profiles:
    active: #spring.profiles.active#
    group:
      dev:
        - dev
        - api-docs

src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.general_idea: Disable JMX in Spring configuration.
Remove Spring Data JPA repository bootstrap mode configuration.
src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.before:
spring:
  data:
    jpa:
      repositories:
        bootstrap-mode: deferred

src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.general_idea: Remove explicit Hibernate JPA properties and naming strategies.
src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.before:
spring:
  jpa:
    open-in-view: false
    properties:
      hibernate.jdbc.time_zone: UTC
      ...
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: update
      naming:
        physical-strategy: ...
        implicit-strategy: ...

src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.general_idea: Remove Spring output ANSI console configuration.
Add Spring DevTools restart and livereload configuration.
src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.after:
spring:
  devtools:
    restart:
      enabled: true
      additional-exclude: static/**
    livereload:
      enabled: false

Remove springdoc actuator configuration.
